name: Loop Accumulator Overflow
description: Augmented assignment (+=, *=) inside a loop body. Unbounded iteration count can overflow the accumulator.
smt2Template:
(declare-const iterations Int)
(declare-const per_iteration Int)
(declare-const {{accumulator}} Int)
(assert (> iterations 0))
(assert (> per_iteration 0))
(assert (= {{accumulator}} (* iterations per_iteration)))
(assert (> {{accumulator}} 9007199254740991))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: metric counter incremented per request with no reset — overflows after months
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const requests Int)
(declare-const counter Int)
(assert (> requests 0))
(assert (= counter requests))
(assert (> counter 9007199254740991))
(check-sat)
